## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager screen for Technical Managing Editor role at GrowthX.ai](https://fathom.video/share/TG8ueorhDVu4T8ayRqy169sYyT_FFgaA?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Role combines content expertise (40%) with operational/product development focus (60%)](https://fathom.video/share/TG8ueorhDVu4T8ayRqy169sYyT_FFgaA?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
  - [Emphasis on articulating processes, problem-solving, and improving content pipelines](https://fathom.video/share/TG8ueorhDVu4T8ayRqy169sYyT_FFgaA?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
  - [Ideal candidate has editorial background + systems thinking + ability to prototype solutions](https://fathom.video/share/TG8ueorhDVu4T8ayRqy169sYyT_FFgaA?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)
  - [Metrics focus: external (client KPIs) and internal (efficiency/productivity improvements)](https://fathom.video/share/TG8ueorhDVu4T8ayRqy169sYyT_FFgaA?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)

## Topics

### Role Overview and Expectations

  - [40% content-related, 60% workflow/operations-focused](https://fathom.video/share/TG8ueorhDVu4T8ayRqy169sYyT_FFgaA?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [Manage 4-5 clients initially, with potential to scale](https://fathom.video/share/TG8ueorhDVu4T8ayRqy169sYyT_FFgaA?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
  - [Articulate processes, identify bottlenecks, prototype solutions](https://fathom.video/share/TG8ueorhDVu4T8ayRqy169sYyT_FFgaA?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
  - [Balance client deliverables with internal product development](https://fathom.video/share/TG8ueorhDVu4T8ayRqy169sYyT_FFgaA?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
  - [Requires content expertise + systems thinking + problem-solving skills](https://fathom.video/share/TG8ueorhDVu4T8ayRqy169sYyT_FFgaA?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)

### Day-to-Day Responsibilities

  - [Ensure client work is shipped and quality standards are met](https://fathom.video/share/TG8ueorhDVu4T8ayRqy169sYyT_FFgaA?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
  - [Articulate where product/processes are working or breaking down](https://fathom.video/share/TG8ueorhDVu4T8ayRqy169sYyT_FFgaA?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
  - [Prototype interim solutions using available tools](https://fathom.video/share/TG8ueorhDVu4T8ayRqy169sYyT_FFgaA?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
  - [Document processes for engineering team to build into product](https://fathom.video/share/TG8ueorhDVu4T8ayRqy169sYyT_FFgaA?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
  - [Manage client deliverables and keep projects on track](https://fathom.video/share/TG8ueorhDVu4T8ayRqy169sYyT_FFgaA?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)

### Metrics and Performance Evaluation

  - [External metrics: traffic growth, keyword rankings, conversions (client-dependent)](https://fathom.video/share/TG8ueorhDVu4T8ayRqy169sYyT_FFgaA?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
  - [Internal metrics: efficiency-focused (e.g., content output per employee, time to produce)](https://fathom.video/share/TG8ueorhDVu4T8ayRqy169sYyT_FFgaA?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)
  - [Goal: improve efficiency to prepare for public platform launch](https://fathom.video/share/TG8ueorhDVu4T8ayRqy169sYyT_FFgaA?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)

### Client Management and Upselling

  - [Directors typically handle client relationships](https://fathom.video/share/TG8ueorhDVu4T8ayRqy169sYyT_FFgaA?tab=summary&timestamp=1633.0)
  - [MEs may interact more with steady-state clients](https://fathom.video/share/TG8ueorhDVu4T8ayRqy169sYyT_FFgaA?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
  - [Active listening for upsell opportunities (e.g., newsletters, glossaries)](https://fathom.video/share/TG8ueorhDVu4T8ayRqy169sYyT_FFgaA?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)
  - [Educate clients on content strategy best practices](https://fathom.video/share/TG8ueorhDVu4T8ayRqy169sYyT_FFgaA?tab=summary&timestamp=1992.0)

### Automation and Tools

  - [Integrate tools like Zapier, Google Sheets, GPT for content libraries](https://fathom.video/share/TG8ueorhDVu4T8ayRqy169sYyT_FFgaA?tab=summary&timestamp=2049.0)
  - [Use Notebook LLM for cross-functional documentation and client info](https://fathom.video/share/TG8ueorhDVu4T8ayRqy169sYyT_FFgaA?tab=summary&timestamp=2176.0)
  - [Airtable for client work, but building proprietary content library](https://fathom.video/share/TG8ueorhDVu4T8ayRqy169sYyT_FFgaA?tab=summary&timestamp=2238.0)
  - [Goal: automate artifact updates and content performance analysis](https://fathom.video/share/TG8ueorhDVu4T8ayRqy169sYyT_FFgaA?tab=summary&timestamp=2361.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Continue evaluating candidates with strong editorial backgrounds and systems thinking](https://fathom.video/share/TG8ueorhDVu4T8ayRqy169sYyT_FFgaA?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)
  - [Develop internal content library for improved querying and analysis](https://fathom.video/share/TG8ueorhDVu4T8ayRqy169sYyT_FFgaA?tab=summary&timestamp=2275.0)
  - [Explore automation opportunities for real-time artifact updates and performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/TG8ueorhDVu4T8ayRqy169sYyT_FFgaA?tab=summary&timestamp=2361.0)
  - [Consider implementing Sheba's strategies for content libraries and cross-functional documentation](https://fathom.video/share/TG8ueorhDVu4T8ayRqy169sYyT_FFgaA?tab=summary&timestamp=2386.0)
